text:
True History is the 10th track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack, as well as the 10th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

All occurrences

Episode 60 - The Eldian soldiers brace themselves for another suicide charge
Episode 63 - Willy's party speech
Episode 64 - Willy's performance begins
Episode 67 - Eren vs Reiner

Navigation
